hochschulstart.de coordinates the Dialogue-Oriented Service Procedure (DoSV). It is primarily necessary for courses with nationwide restricted admission limits (Numerus Clausus).
TestAS is a central standardized scholastic aptitude test. Many universities have made it an obligation for non-EU applicants to assess cognitive skills.

patterns: what should i pick here for applying at uni assist
responses: For uni-assist, you will generally need to upload your senior school certificate examination and language proofs. Make sure to select the specific semester you are targeting.
